title: fumaria agraria
intro: Fumaria agraria, also known as Fumitory, is a flowering plant species in the genus Fumaria of the family Papaveraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing high blood pressure, improving liver function, and providing antioxidant properties. Fumaria agraria is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional herbal medicine for centuries to treat a range of ailments.
